---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for mqvi
title: "[Component] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed?

## Proposed Solution

How should this work from the user's perspective? Describe the desired behavior.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why is the proposed solution better?

## Additional Context

Mockups, screenshots, or references to similar features in other applications.
